title: Nac's Null Charges
description: Corrupts wind charges and gives them a new look!
body:
# Missing Textures!

Inspired on the well known glitch, and made for a jam in PMC

The textures of the wind charge and its particles turn into a glitchy mess!

Now you can wield and impulse yourself with corrupt energy!

<details>
<summary>List of Changes</summary>

- Wind Charge item Texture (_Animated!_)
- Wind Charge entity Texture
- "Gust" particle Texture
- "Wind Burst" Sounds.
</details>

## More Planned!
In the future i plan to change the breezes and wind burst potion.

And just maybe the names of things too!


<details>
<summary>Terms of Use</summary>

If you want to use my pack in another resource pack, make sure to credit me,
This also applies if you just modify the same pack, i will ask for credit.

You are free to use my pack personally and include it in videos without issue.

... As long as you don't claim that you made it, in that case i'd get angry.

</details>
